title: Nakhal heat wave
lead: Nakhal is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.40. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Nakhal has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 21.4 GG. 
 The low humidity of 14% and moderate wind speed of 8.7 km/h are exacerbating the heat. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) with a value of 0.0 GG indicates the dominance of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures in Nakhal.
